title: New York Core certification
excerpt:
Exciting news! The monday.com certification workshops are coming to London, New York, and Sydney! and our community gets a special discount! 
These workshops are specifically designed to upskill champions and power users…

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Exciting news! The monday.com certification workshops are coming to London, New York, and Sydney! and our community gets a special discount!

These workshops are specifically designed to upskill champions and power users, led by our top-notch monday.com experts. It’s an incredible opportunity for a deep-dive learning experience that will elevate user proficiency with our platform. The exclusive package includes in-person training at our monday offices, alongside the online work management core certification. It’s a power-packed combo to enhance monday skills!

Join us for our core work management workshop

Price: $500
Locations: monday office’s in London, NY and Sydney
Dates:
London: 20.2
New York: 27.2
Sydney: 19.3 & 20.32.

Special discount for monday community - 20% until February 8th with the coupon code: communityworkshop20

banner world tour900×305 80.8 KB

posts.author: JenniferS (Jennifer Stevens)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there another one planned after this?

posts.author: kyledeleon (Kyle O'Pry DeLeon)
posts.cookedHtml: I got a receipt showing I padi for this certification workshop, but I was never sent any logisitcs or information about the course material. When will that be sent?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kyledeleon,

How are you?! Im sorry for just seeing this now. Has this been resolved? Where you able to be int ouch with the certification team about the payment?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Jennifer! Yes there are a few more planned! including one in NYC on May 6th!

posts.author: JenniferS (Jennifer Stevens)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Juliette - I was able to get the Denver event in May booked, looking forward to it!
